Title: Geometric Abstract Block Print T-Shirt
Description:
A visually striking t-shirt featuring a modern, abstract geometric block design. This tee combines clean lines and simple shapes with a palette of earthy tones—teal, mustard yellow, warm brown, and slate gray—creating a sophisticated piece of wearable art.

The geometric motif is inspired by mid-century modern aesthetics and minimalist design principles, making it a versatile addition to any wardrobe. Whether paired with denim for a casual weekend outing or layered under a blazer for a creative professional look, this shirt adds an instant artistic edge to your style.

  • Material Feel: Crafted from premium, soft-wash cotton (or suitable blend), offering breathability and all-day comfort.
  • Design Versatility: The balanced, abstract pattern works beautifully for various occasions, ensuring it remains a staple piece.
  • Gift Idea: Makes an excellent unique gift for art lovers, designers, architects, or anyone who appreciates modern, graphic prints.

Sizing & Fit: This tee is designed with a relaxed, unisex fit, allowing for comfort and movement. Please refer to the detailed size chart for accurate measurements and fit guidance.
